text: A limited use vehicle which, except for the provisions of article forty-eight-A and § 400-A (Exceptions to registration provisions) , would be subject to registration pursuant to subdivision six of § 401 (Registration of motor vehicles) .
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 121-A — Limited use automobile

A limited use vehicle which, except for the provisions of article forty-eight-A and § 400-A (Exceptions to registration provisions) , would be subject to registration pursuant to subdivision six of § 401 (Registration of motor vehicles) .

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
